overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through Night City at dusk. The player navigates urban streets with neon-lit buildings, crosses intersections with futuristic vehicles, and passes by cyberpunk architecture including a building with a prominent diamond-shaped logo.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a massive building with digital billboards, approaching a crosswalk

large vertical digital display showing 'TRUST' with a skull graphic

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a covered sidewalk next to a massive cyberpunk building adorned with digital billboards. The environment transitions from a sheltered walkway to an open intersection approach, with street lights and distant traffic signals becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy street intersection with vehicle traffic

emerges from under truck and continues walking along sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player enters a busy intersection crossing, where an orange pickup truck and green sports car are passing through. The camera briefly clips through the truck's undercarriage before continuing along the sidewalk, passing orange construction barriers.

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a wide sidewalk bordered by a massive building wall on the left and a street on the right. The pavement appears wet and reflective. A pedestrian in a distinctive yellow jacket walks ahead, serving as a focal point while distant city lights and occasional vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with political billboard and city skyline view

crossing the street toward a building with a large diamond-shaped logo

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing the city skyline and passing by a prominent billboard

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard displaying 'VOTE' with political imagery
low-rise building with multiple garage-style doors beneath the billboard
distant futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a wide urban intersection, revealing an expansive view of the distant city skyline against the dusk sky. A prominent 'VOTE' billboard sits atop a small commercial building. The scene opens up significantly, showing the scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern commercial street with corporate architecture

events.description: passing modern building with illuminated diamond-shaped corporate logo

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past modern corporate architecture with distinctive neon signage

entered.detail: futuristic building facade featuring a large glowing white diamond-shaped logo
yellow and white neon strip lighting along building edges

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a modern commercial street, passing a building with a distinctive glowing diamond-shaped logo. The architecture features sleek lines and neon accent lighting. Other pedestrians walk ahead as the street continues into the distance with tall buildings visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway into the open, neon-lit bustle of a city intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk beneath the glow of massive digital billboards, moving forward as the sheltered path opens up toward a wide street crossing. As the camera enters the intersection, it passes through the flow of traffic featuring an orange pickup truck and a green sports car before navigating past orange construction barriers. The scene then shifts to a wide, wet sidewalk where the reflective pavement mirrors the surrounding city lights. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow jacket, moving alongside a towering building wall as distant vehicles glide past in the dusk.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, open urban intersection into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a commercial district. It begins by crossing a broad street, where the view expands to reveal a sprawling cyberpunk skyline and a prominent VOTE billboard atop a nearby building against the dusk sky. As the camera moves forward, the expansive vista narrows into a sleek commercial street characterized by modern architecture and glowing neon accents. The scene then shifts focus toward a building featuring a distinctive glowing diamond-shaped logo while passing other pedestrians. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the city, with the street stretching toward a backdrop of towering skyscrapers.
